layers.name: Hook title
layers.text:
Why some students study 8 hours a day
and still get bad grades

layers.name: Body copy
layers.text:
Some students sit at their desk for 8 hours
and still get bad grades.

I used a Pomodoro timer.
I cleaned my desk.
I found the right white noise.

But it still took me too long
to start the first question.

That is when I realized it.

layers.name: Headline
layers.text: Some students sit at their desk for 8 hours
